items.title: How to Come Up with a Great Game Jam Idea—Fast
items.author: Selfish Dev
items.content:
How to Come Up with a Great Game Jam Idea—Fast

You might be wondering—who am I to tell you how to generate good game ideas quickly?

Well, I won’t claim to be a top-tier programmer. In fact, I still struggle with coding. But when it comes to game ideas, I always manage to surprise people.

I’ve participated in , and in every single one, my strongest scores were in theme interpretation, concept, and originality—the core elements of a great game jam entry.

  • (66 participants)

    • (34 participants)

      • (64 participants)

        I think that speaks for itself. Now, let’s get to the real topic—how can come up with a great game idea quickly?

        HOW COULD U GET GOOD IDEA TOO

        People love the unexpected. Not everyone, of course—but game developers, especially in jams, are attracted to ideas that feel unique and out of box. Something they never saw coming.

        And that’s my simple secret sauce for ranking high in the Theme category during game jams. Think differently. Surprise people.

        Let’s break it down with some real examples from the jams I participated in:

        My Idea: A game where you assemble chemical elements to form compounds. The twist? You can't see the elements—you have to guess them.

        Why It Worked: Most people likely interpreted "assemble" in a mechanical or puzzle-based way (e.g., building robots, fixing broken machines). But my take on assembling invisible elements through logic and chemistry was something fresh and unexpected.

        Theme: Odd One Out My Idea: A game where you're given chat messages, and you have to guess whether they are AI-generated or real.

        Why It Worked: The theme "Odd One Out" could have easily led to spot-the-difference games or simple pattern recognition. Instead, I made a game that challenges players to differentiate between humans and AI—a concept that feels modern, relevant, and thought-provoking.

        Theme: Defense & Time is Enemy My Idea: A game where you try to download GTA 6, but end up downloading a virus instead. You then need to install a firewall, solve puzzles, and remove the virus before it spreads.

        Why It Worked: Instead of a typical "defend your base" game, I turned cybersecurity into the battlefield. The enemy wasn’t an army—it was time itself, as the virus spreads while you scramble to stop it. This unique approach made it stand out.

        By looking at these examples, you’ll see a pattern—each time, I approached the theme from a different angle than most people would.

        How you could do the same? -Just look at theme from angle no one would.

items.title: Next.js 14+ Performance Optimization: Modern Approaches for Production Applications
items.author: Muhammad Hamza
items.content:
Next.js 14 introduces powerful performance capabilities through the App Router architecture, React Server Components, and enhanced rendering strategies. However, without proper implementation, developers can still encounter performance bottlenecks. This article explores evidence-based approaches to optimize Next.js applications for production environments.

1. Leveraging Server Components for Optimal Data Fetching

The App Router in Next.js 14+ fundamentally changes how we approach data fetching by making React Server Components the default.

Loading...

The optimized approach eliminates loading states, waterfall requests, and reduces client-side JavaScript while leveraging Next.js automatic request deduplication.

2. Implementing Partial Prerendering for Dynamic Content

Next.js 14.1+ introduced Partial Prerendering, combining static and dynamic content rendering for optimal performance.

Loading activity...

This approach delivers instant static content while dynamically loading personalized elements, significantly improving Time to First Byte (TTFB) and Largest Contentful Paint (LCP).

3. Optimizing Images with Modern Next.js Image Component

The Image component in Next.js 14+ offers advanced optimizations with improved configuration options.

This implementation provides:

  • Responsive sizing based on viewport
  • Priority loading for critical images
  • Blur-up placeholders for improved perceived performance
  • Automatic WebP/AVIF format conversion
  • Proper accessibility through descriptive alt text

4. Implementing Strategic Component-Level Memoization

React memoization should be applied strategically rather than indiscriminately.

This approach applies memoization only where benchmarking has identified genuine performance benefits, avoiding the overhead of unnecessary memoization.

5. Implementing Advanced Code Splitting Strategies

Next.js 14+ offers sophisticated code splitting capabilities beyond basic dynamic imports.

This implementation leverages:

  • Route groups for domain-specific code splitting
  • Suspense boundaries for progressive loading
  • Dynamic imports with fallback UI
  • Parallel routes for independent loading of page sections

6. Streaming Server Rendering for Improved User Experience

Streaming allows sending UI pieces as they become ready, improving perceived performance.

This streaming approach delivers a significant UX improvement by showing meaningful content earlier, especially on slower connections or complex pages.

7. Optimizing Third-Party JavaScript

Excessive or poorly loaded third-party scripts can significantly impact performance.

Proper script loading strategies ensure third-party code doesn't block critical rendering paths.

Performance optimization in Next.js 14+ requires understanding the framework's architecture and rendering model. By leveraging Server Components, implementing partial prerendering, optimizing image delivery, applying strategic memoization, utilizing advanced code splitting, implementing streaming, and managing third-party scripts effectively, developers can build applications that deliver exceptional user experiences while maintaining optimal Core Web Vitals.

These techniques have been validated across enterprise Next.js deployments and represent current best practices as of 2025. As with any performance optimization, measure before and after implementation using tools like Lighthouse, WebPageTest, and the Next.js built-in analytics to ensure meaningful improvements.

items.title: How to Protect Your Web App from Common Security Vulnerabilities (XSS, CSRF, SQL Injection)
items.author: Tao Christopher Takahashi
items.content:
Web security is one of the most critical aspects of application development. Without proper safeguards, applications can be vulnerable to attacks such as Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF), and SQL Injection. In this post, we'll cover what these vulnerabilities are and how to mitigate them effectively.

1. Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)

XSS is an attack where malicious scripts are injected into webpages viewed by other users. These scripts can steal session cookies, redirect users to malicious sites, or deface the website.

✅ Use proper encoding to prevent execution of injected scripts.

✅ Use a CSP (Content Security Policy): A CSP restricts which scripts can be executed on your site.

✅ Validate and Sanitize Input: Use libraries like to sanitize input:

✅ Don't use inline JavaScript like:

Click me

Instead, move scripts to external files.

2. Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF)

CSRF tricks an authenticated user into submitting a request to a web application without their consent. This can be used to change account settings, transfer funds, or perform other actions on behalf of the victim.

✅ Generate and validate CSRF tokens for form submissions.

✅ Set attribute to or to prevent unauthorized cross-origin requests.

✅ Check that requests originate from trusted sources.

SQL Injection occurs when an attacker injects malicious SQL queries into an input field to manipulate the database.

How to Prevent SQL Injection?

✅

✅ Use ORM (Object-Relational Mapping) Libraries: ORMs like TypeORM and Prisma automatically handle query sanitization.

✅ Validate and Sanitize Input: Use input validation libraries like or :

✅ Limit Database Permissions: Ensure that database users have the minimum required privileges to reduce impact if compromised.

Securing your web application against XSS, CSRF, and SQL Injection is essential to prevent unauthorized access and data breaches. By escaping user input, using CSRF tokens, and implementing prepared statements, you can significantly reduce security risks in your web applications.

items.title: Exploring My Melody Merch: Top Picks for Sanrio Enthusiasts
items.author: NAWAZ RASOOL
items.content:
My Melody, the charming white rabbit created by Sanrio, has won the hearts of fans around the globe since her introduction in 1975. With her sweet personality and iconic appearance, My Melody has become a beloved character in the Sanrio universe, often seen alongside other popular figures like Hello Kitty and Kuromi. Whether you're a long-time fan or new to the world of Sanrio, My Melody's vast range of merchandise offers something for everyone. In this article, we’ll explore some of the top picks for My Melody merchandise that every Sanrio enthusiast will adore.

  1. My Melody Plush Toys Plush toys are a staple in any Sanrio collection, and My Melody is no exception. Soft, cuddly, and undeniably cute, My Melody plushies come in a variety of sizes and designs. Whether you're looking for a small keychain version or a larger, more detailed plush to display, there’s a My Melody plush for you.

Top Pick: My Melody 8" Ultra-Premier Plush The My Melody 8" Ultra-Premier Plush is a fan favorite, known for its high-quality craftsmanship and adorable details. This plush is perfect for those who love to display their favorite characters or cuddle up with them during movie nights. Its soft fabric and cute design make it a must-have for any My Melody enthusiast.

You can find plushies like this at online retailers like Sanrio.com or specialty stores that sell Sanrio merchandise.

  1. My Melody Apparel For those who want to wear their fandom proudly, My Melody-themed apparel is an excellent choice. From casual tees to more stylish items like hoodies and dresses, My Melody has made her way onto clothing that blends cuteness with comfort.

Top Pick: My Melody Sweet Hearts Tee Shirt One of the best-selling apparel items is the "My Melody Sweet Hearts Tee Shirt." Featuring a cute graphic of My Melody surrounded by colorful hearts, this tee is perfect for adding a pop of charm to your everyday wardrobe. It’s available in various sizes, making it a great option for fans of all ages.

Apparel featuring My Melody can be found at retailers like Hot Topic and Amazon, or directly from the Sanrio website.

  1. Stationery and Office Supplies If you're a fan of cute stationery, My Melody offers a variety of products that will bring joy to your workspace. From notebooks to pens and pencil cases, My Melody stationery can brighten up any desk.

Top Pick: My Melody Notebook and Pen Set A fan favorite is the My Melody Notebook and Pen Set, perfect for jotting down notes or journaling. The set often features My Melody’s iconic bow and pastel colors, making it an aesthetically pleasing choice for any fan. It’s a great gift idea for anyone who loves to write or doodle.

These items are available from stores like Primark, Sanrio, and various online marketplaces.

  1. Kitchenware and Home Decor My Melody fans can also extend their love for this cute bunny into their kitchens and living rooms. From mugs and plates to home decor items, there are plenty of ways to incorporate My Melody into your home.

Top Pick: My Melody Ceramic Mug A My Melody ceramic mug makes a perfect addition to any fan's kitchen. These mugs are available in a variety of styles, featuring My Melody’s face or her full body in playful designs. Whether you’re sipping your morning coffee or enjoying an afternoon tea, a My Melody mug is a delightful way to brighten your day.

Additionally, My Melody-themed home decor such as pillows, blankets, and wall art are great ways to create a cozy and cute atmosphere in any room.

  1. Tech Accessories For tech-savvy Sanrio fans, My Melody merchandise extends to tech accessories, including phone cases, laptop sleeves, and headphones. These items combine practicality with My Melody's cute appeal, making them functional and fun.

Top Pick: My Melody Phone Case A My Melody phone case is a great way to show off your love for the character while keeping your phone safe. These cases come in a variety of designs, including clear cases with colorful My Melody illustrations or more minimalistic options with a simple logo. They are available for different phone models, including iPhone and Samsung, so you can easily find one that suits your needs.

Top Pick: My Melody Wireless Earbuds For those who love music, My Melody wireless earbuds are a perfect blend of cute and functional. These earbuds not only offer great sound quality but also feature My Melody's signature design, making them a must-have accessory for tech enthusiasts who are also fans of Sanrio characters.

  1. Limited Edition Collectibles Limited edition My Melody items are highly sought after by collectors. These exclusive products often feature unique designs or commemorate special events, such as My Melody's anniversary or collaborations with other brands.

Top Pick: My Melody x Igloo 50th Anniversary Stainless Steel Can One standout limited edition item is the My Melody x Igloo 50th Anniversary Stainless Steel Can. This insulated drink container is not only practical for keeping beverages hot or cold, but it also serves as a collector's item for those who have followed My Melody’s journey for decades. Items like this are perfect for fans who want to own a piece of My Melody’s history.

These limited edition items can often be found at stores like Sanrio.com, Sugoimart, and other specialty retailers that carry Sanrio merchandise.

  1. DIY Kits For fans who enjoy crafting, My Melody DIY kits provide a fun and creative way to build your own My Melody-themed items. These kits can include everything from plushie-making sets to jewelry crafting materials.

Top Pick: My Melody Plushie DIY Kit A favorite among crafters is the My Melody Plushie DIY Kit. This kit allows you to create your very own My Melody plush, complete with fabric, sewing needles, and detailed instructions. It’s a great project for anyone who wants to personalize their collection and create something truly special.

  1. Bags and Wallets Accessorizing with My Melody-themed bags and wallets is another great way to showcase your love for this adorable bunny. From everyday totes to small coin purses, there’s a wide variety of My Melody accessories to choose from.

Top Pick: My Melody Crossbody Bag A My Melody crossbody bag is both stylish and functional. Perfect for everyday use, this bag typically features My Melody’s face or her signature bow, making it an eye-catching addition to any outfit. It's available in various styles, including larger bags for carrying essentials or smaller ones for just your wallet and phone.

  1. Seasonal Merchandise If you love celebrating holidays and special occasions, My Melody seasonal merchandise is perfect for you. From Christmas ornaments to Halloween-themed accessories, these items allow you to enjoy your favorite character year-round.

Top Pick: My Melody Christmas Ornament A My Melody Christmas ornament is a festive way to incorporate the character into your holiday celebrations. Whether it’s adorning your Christmas tree or being displayed as part of your holiday decor, this ornament adds a cute touch to any seasonal setup.

  1. Jewelry and Watches For a more elegant take on My Melody merch, jewelry and watches featuring the character are a popular choice. Whether you prefer necklaces, bracelets, or watches, these accessories are a great way to add a touch of cuteness to your outfit.

Top Pick: My Melody Charm Bracelet A My Melody charm bracelet is a delightful accessory that lets you wear your fandom on your sleeve. The bracelet typically features several charms, including My Melody's face, her signature bow, and other cute elements from the character's world. It’s a perfect gift for fans who love to accessorize.

Where to Find My Melody Merchandise My Melody merchandise can be found at a variety of online and physical stores. Popular retailers such as Sanrio, Amazon, Hot Topic, and BoxLunch carry a wide selection of My Melody products. Additionally, you can find exclusive or limited edition items at specialized stores and Sanrio’s own boutique locations.

Final Thoughts Whether you're a casual fan or a dedicated collector, My Melody merchandise offers something for everyone. From plush toys and apparel to limited edition collectibles and DIY kits, there’s no shortage of cute and functional items to add to your collection. So, why not explore the world of My Melody and find the perfect pieces to express your fandom? Happy shopping!

items.title: Critical Kubernetes monitoring best practices you can't afford to ignore
items.author: Angeline
items.content:
Kubernetes has transformed the application landscape, but in all honesty, monitoring those dynamic, ever-shifting environments, with their ephemeral pods and complex microservices, can be a real headache. Without a solid monitoring strategy, you're basically playing application roulette – and the stakes are high. This article is here to help. We're diving deep into the best practices for Kubernetes monitoring to ensure top-notch performance, bulletproof security, and smart resource utilization.

1. Embrace full-stack observability

Imagine being able to see every moving part of your Kubernetes environment, understand how they all interact, and pinpoint the root cause of any performance issue in seconds. That's the power of full-stack observability. It's more than just monitoring; it's about gaining deep, actionable insights. Full-stack observability combines three essential data sources:

  • The vital signs of your infrastructure and applications. They give you a real-time snapshot of performance.
  • The detailed history of events, which provides the context you need for effective troubleshooting.
  • The end-to-end journey of requests, which reveals hidden bottlenecks and dependencies. By integrating these three data streams, you can proactively identify and resolve issues, optimize resource utilization, and deliver a seamless user experience. Stop reacting to problems and start proactively managing your Kubernetes deployments with the power of full-stack observability.

Full-stack monitoring tools like ManageEngine Applications Manager empower teams to move from reactive firefighting to proactive problem-solving. By correlating data across all layers of the application stack, these tools provide a comprehensive understanding of application performance and dependencies. This cross-layer visibility is crucial for efficient troubleshooting. Instead of spending valuable time searching for the root cause of performance issues, you can quickly identify the source of the problem and take corrective action. This not only minimizes downtime but also allows you to optimize your application's performance and resource utilization. With full-stack monitoring, you can proactively identify potential issues, optimize resource allocation, and ensure a smooth and reliable user experience, ultimately contributing to a more efficient and effective IT operation.

2. Focus on the right Kubernetes metrics

Kubernetes throws a ton of metrics at you. And while all that data could be useful, trying to analyze it all at once is a recipe for overwhelm. You end up drowning in information, making it harder to find the real insights you need to keep your applications running smoothly. The key is to be selective.

  • First, Is your cluster stable? Are your nodes healthy? Is the scheduler performing well? These are the foundational metrics.

  • Second, pod and container performance: Are your pods and containers using resources efficiently? Are there any resource bottlenecks? These metrics help you pinpoint performance issues within specific applications.

  • And finally, How are your users experiencing your application? What's the latency? What are the error rates? These are the metrics that directly impact user satisfaction. By focusing on these key areas, you can cut through the noise and get to the actionable insights you need to keep your Kubernetes deployments healthy and optimized.

3. Master Kubernetes labeling and tagging: your secret weapon for efficient operations

In the dynamic and often complex world of Kubernetes, proper labeling isn't just a good idea—it's essential for efficient operations. Think of labels as the DNA of your Kubernetes resources, allowing you to instantly filter, group, and troubleshoot issues. Without a solid labeling strategy, you'll be lost in a sea of data, struggling to find the root cause of problems and impacting application performance.

Why is labeling so crucial?

  • Quickly isolate specific workloads, deployments, or resources.
  • Create dashboards and visualizations that focus on the data you need.
  • Enforce policies effectively: Apply monitoring and security policies based on labels.
  • Use labels to automate scaling, deployments, and other management tasks.

Here's your cheat sheet for effective Kubernetes labeling:

  • Environment (env=production, env=staging): Absolutely essential for separating workloads across environments. Don't mix production traffic with dev/test!
  • Application/Microservice (app=my-app, service=payment): Identify and group related components. Makes monitoring and troubleshooting a breeze.
  • Version (version=v1.2.3, version=v1.2.4): Track deployments and enable easy rollbacks. Crucial for managing application updates.
  • Team/Owner (team=devops, owner=john.doe): Assign ownership and responsibility. Makes it easy to know who to contact when issues arise.
  • Component (component=frontend, component=backend): Identify different parts of your application. Helps pinpoint performance bottlenecks.
  • Tier (tier=frontend, tier=database): Categorize resources based on their function. Useful for applying different policies.

4. Smart alerting: Stop drowning in notifications

Too many alerts? Your team will start ignoring them. Too few? You'll miss critical issues. Smart alerting is all about balance. It's about getting the right alerts at the right time.

Alert types (and when to use them):

  • Critical (immediate action required): Service downtime, node failures, high pod eviction rate. These are your red alerts – they need attention now.
  • Warning (potential issues): Increased latency, CPU/memory nearing limits, unusual error rates. These are your yellow flags – investigate before they become critical.
  • Informational (for your information): Successful deployments, auto-scaling events, configuration changes. Useful for tracking activity and understanding trends.

Advanced alerting techniques (Level up your alerting game):

  • Don't rely on static thresholds. Use dynamic thresholds that adapt to your application's behavior.
  • Anomaly detection (AI-powered insights): Leverage AI platforms like Moogsoft or built-in capabilities in tools like Applications Manager to detect unusual behavior and predict potential problems.
  • Alert deduplication and correlation (no more alert storms): Group related alerts and suppress duplicate notifications. This reduces alert noise and helps your team focus on the real issues.
  • Routing and escalation (get the right people involved): Route alerts to the appropriate teams based on severity and type. Escalate critical alerts to ensure they're addressed promptly.

5. Implement multi-cluster & hybrid cloud monitoring

Running Kubernetes across multiple clusters and cloud providers? Centralized visibility is paramount. Unified monitoring eliminates blind spots and ensures consistent reliability across all your infrastructures. Cloud-native monitoring tools like ManageEngine Applications Manager are essential here, providing deep insights into application performance and resource utilization, wherever your workloads reside.

6. Tame the high-cardinality data beast

Kubernetes generates tons of high-cardinality data. Don't let it overwhelm your monitoring systems! Optimize data collection to avoid performance issues:

  • Reduce unnecessary metric collection by filtering out high-cardinality labels.
  • Downsample and retain smartly: Use downsampling and retention policies to manage storage in tools like Prometheus.
  • Adaptive sampling for traces: Capture only essential data in distributed tracing. Example: Log only slow responses or high-latency database queries.

7. Fort Knox your Kubernetes monitoring: Security best practices

Securing Kubernetes monitoring requires a multi-layered approach:

  • Role-based access control (RBAC): Lock down your monitoring dashboards. Only authorized users should have access.
  • Data protection (Encryption): Encrypt logs and metrics both in transit and at rest. Protect that sensitive operational data!
  • Activity monitoring (Auditing): Regularly audit API requests and cluster events. Detect suspicious activity and investigate potential breaches.

8. Automate and scale: Your monitoring must evolve

Kubernetes monitoring needs to scale with your workloads. Automation is key:

  • GitOps for config management: Manage your monitoring configurations like code.
  • Scripting for automation: Automate log rotation, metric collection, and alert tuning.
  • Scale your monitoring tools: Use HPA to scale monitoring components like Prometheus and Grafana.
  • Leverage tools like ManageEngine Applications Manager’s auto-discovery to dynamically track new Kubernetes resources.

9. Continuous testing and optimization: Never Stop improving

Your Kubernetes monitoring strategy shouldn't be static. Continuous testing and optimization are essential for long-term success:

  • Proactive problem identification: Use load testing and chaos engineering to uncover potential issues before they impact users.
  • Identify blind spots in your monitoring coverage to improve incident response and minimize downtime.
  • Gain deeper insights into application behavior to optimize resource allocation and cut costs.
  • Regularly review and update your monitoring configurations to meet evolving regulatory requirements.

About ManageEngine Applications Manager

Kubernetes monitoring can be complex, but it doesn't have to be a struggle. ManageEngine Applications Manager simplifies the process with a comprehensive suite of features built specifically for Kubernetes. Get real-time visibility into your clusters, nodes, pods, and containers. Leverage AI-driven anomaly detection to proactively identify and address potential problems. Automate key tasks and optimize resource utilization for maximum efficiency. Try it today and see how easy Kubernetes monitoring can be!

items.title: Setting Up an Nginx Reverse Proxy with an Authentication System (NestJS Example)
items.author: Tao Christopher Takahashi
items.content:
Nginx is a powerful web server that can also act as a reverse proxy, load balancer, and caching server. One of its common use cases is to serve as a reverse proxy in front of multiple backend services while handling authentication at the proxy level.

In this post, we’ll cover how to:

  • Set up an Nginx reverse proxy for a backend.
  • Implement an authentication system to control access to backend services.
  • Secure and optimize the configuration.

Why Use an Nginx Reverse Proxy?

A reverse proxy helps by:

  • : Hiding internal services from direct exposure.
  • : Distributing traffic across multiple instances.
  • Centralized authentication: Enforcing authentication before requests reach backend services.
  • : Handling HTTPS at the proxy level to offload encryption work.

Setting Up a NestJS Backend

First, let’s create a simple backend that will be proxied by Nginx.

1. Install NestJS CLI and Create a Project

npm i  @nestjs/cli
nest new my-backend
my-backend

2. Create an Authentication Module

nest generate module auth
nest generate controller auth
nest generate service auth

Configuring Nginx as a Reverse Proxy for NestJS 

apt update apt nginx

2. Configure the Reverse Proxy

Edit the Nginx configuration file:

nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/reverse-proxy.conf

Add the following configuration:

Adding an Authentication Layer

To restrict access, we can introduce an authentication mechanism.

1. JWT Authentication with Nginx and NestJS

We’ll modify our Nginx configuration to validate JWTs by forwarding authentication requests to the auth service.

Edit the Nginx configuration:

Using Nginx as a reverse proxy with authentication for a backend provides a way to manage access to backend services. By leveraging , we ensure requests are validated before reaching our backend services.

items.title: How to Improve Presentation Skills?
items.author: Mammad Yahyayev
items.content:
Hello people, today I will share the favorite tricks that I learned from the course on Udemy. The course is PowerPoint Presentation Masterclass — Presentation Design & Animation. These tricks that I will share today, saved my tons of time while creating presentation.

Why creating presentation is important?

Before we begin, I want to answer the questions. Creating a good presentation could be vitally important in your life.

Let’s assume you have a company, and you need to advertise your products. The most important thing is the presentation. Sometimes presentations give more insights about your products than words.

Good presentations skills that bring you more money and more success.

You need to acquire this skill, it doesn’t matter what is your occupation, because 90% of time you will need this in your life. College/University students, public speakers, teachers, developers, product owners, project managers and list goes on and all of them should have good presentation skills if they want to stand out from the rest of people.

How can I create good presentation?

This one is other important question. If you have great presentation skills, but you create for the wrong audience, it will be time wasting.

Before creating any presentation, you need to know your audience. Where and to which audience are you going to present?.

If you are a teacher and you need to explain some difficult concept to the students, giving plenty of animations can be distracting even if it looks amazing.

But if you are a product owner in a game company, adding animations will be enticing to game lovers. Therefore before the presentation, always identify your audience.

The another thing that you need to give attention that is the time of the presentation. Let’s assume you are a public speaker, and you have limited time to present. If you create numerous slides, perhaps there will be no time to complete your presentation or you can present every slide quicker, but this time you will be uncertain whether people understand your idea or not.

Therefore, I prefer not to present the slides that takes more than 30 minutes to talk all of them, but it depends on the place where you are going to present.

If you want to create a good presentation, you need to consider the followings.

  • Adjust time of the presentation

Why speed is important to create presentation?

When I was university, I had spent my whole day to create presentations. After creating each presentation, I have learned new things then applied them for the future presentations to save time and effort.

When I say speed is important, I don’t mean add 2 images, some texts to complete the presentations in 5 minutes. Explaining your idea is more important than speed, but saving some time meanwhile creating your presentations, can be very helpful to think more about the idea.

Structure of your presentation folder

In my point of view, the most important things the structure of your presentation folder. Actually, a lot of people, don’t structure the presentations, they will keep all images, resources in different folders, files and this takes so much time to find them. Thus the most crucial thing is the structure.

In the image above, this is the structure of my presentations. I keep all images, icons on Images folder, and some documents, pdf files, word files, presentations files on Resources folder.

This is the base structure of my all presentations and saves tons of my time. Furthermore, if you need you can add other folders, files depend on the presentations you want to make, but the base structure always remains the same.

It is good to collect the images, files, generally resources in advance. If there are tons of files that have unclear names and you don’t rename the files, you will spend your time to find the correct image in the folder.

For example, let’s download the picture at below.

When I download this picture, the name was pexels-trace-hudson-2475301.jpg. It will be hard to remember, if you have lots of images.

Thus I can rename it to train or metro for based on the image. You might say, this will take time to rename it, but trust me it will be less than to find it. Same purpose works well for the files.

Slides’ contents in one file

I really like to store all slides’ contents in one Microsoft Word file or notepad. After I found my resources, I copy contents from websites, pdf files into one file and modify it a little bit such as adding titles, adjusting font size, changing font family and so on. Then I will copy from that Microsoft Word file into slides.

The plan is created automatically, if you keep all the contents in one file.

The texts copied from the Wikipedia and those are just examples, I adjusted a little bit, but I kept underlines, perhaps you need to highlight them in the slides as well.

The another great thing about this, you can prepare your presentation by reading from it, because adding every resource into your slides will make it untidy. However you need to speak more than you wrote in the slides. Creating this Word file will assist you to make your speech.

When you add images into your slides, sometimes they will be inserted abnormally bigger. In order to fit them in slide, you need to zoom out. Sometimes it takes a little bit of time. Therefore I set the size of the paper 16:9 size, and work with 50% zoom. You will understand why it is so useful.

This is my workarea for each slide. The great thing is that I can add different images to the around of the slide.

As you can see on the above, I added different images around the slide. If I want to give color to shape, no need to set the value of the RGB color manually. Use Eyedropper to give background colors. I take screenshots of the colors from the website Color Hunt.

Take a screenshot, place the image around the slide, then click the color with Eyedropper to give the color to the shape. With this way, we can easiliy resize, select, adjust the images, shapes or texts. 16:9 slide size and 50% zoom are a great combination.

However you can set those values whatever you want. In order to change slide size. Do the following steps.

  1. In Design tab, you will see Slide Size

Also you can customize your slide size by yourself.

Caution: I use Microsoft Powerpoint Professional 2016, I hope it will be in the same location in other versions of Powerpoint, if you can’t find it, let me know in the comment section below, I will try to help you.

A lot of people underestimate power of the Quick Access Toolbar, but it provide you really good amount of time. There are some tools that hard to find in Powerpoint, if you have less practice.

Quick Access Toolbar, as the name suggest, allow you to access those tools easily and quickly. In my presentations, I use following tools regularly.

    You can add your favorite tools into , and you can access them by using keyword combinations or clicking the icon of the tool with mouse.

    Adding tools into is so easy. Click right button of the mouse over the tool, then popup will be appear over tool, then click Add to Quick Access Toolbar option.

    You can manage the tools from window. In order to open the window, do the following steps.

    Click the icon which highlighted with arrow. Then select More Commands option in the opened popup.

    After choosing the More Commands, window will be open on the center of screen.

    You can configure your toolbar from here. In order to access the tools fast, use keyboards combinations.

    When you press Alt key, you will see the numbers and letters like above image. After that you can press any number to use tools from Quick Access Toolbar. In my case, is Shapes, is Textbox and so on.

    Format panel allows you to add more adjustments for shapes, texts, backgrounds, images and so on. If you keep this panel open, you can easily modify the objects without moving over the ribbon menu.

    The another great thing is, when you select different objects, it will change Format panel to Format Shape, Format Picture, Format Background based on the element.

    If you right-click on the slide, then select Format Background or right-click on the shape, then select Format Shape and similarly applies to text objects.

    Keyboard combinations are very important in Microsoft Powerpoint as in every other desktop application. If you get accustom to work with them, you will not want to move your hand from the keyboard most of the times.

    I don’t force you to learn every keyboard combination in Powerpoint, because it is almost impossible to remember all of them, just learn the basic and most common ones such as increase or decrease the font size, create or duplicate slide, quick access toolbar keyword combinations that we’ve already seen those.

    Try these combinations on your own, but don’t forget that you need to select text in order to apply text related keyboard combinations, select slides for slide related keyboard combinations, select objects for object related keyboard combinations and so on.

    I want to conclude the article with the Udemy course that I’ve mention on the beginning of the article. The course helped me a lot to learn plenty of new things, even if I have quite experience in Microsoft Powerpoint.

items.title: How to Change Account Picture in Windows 11?
items.author: Narendhiran Vijayakumar
items.content:
Changing your in Windows 11 is a quick way to personalize your experience. Your account picture appears on the sign-in screen, Start menu, and in various apps which will making it as a reflection of your identity on the device. In this simple tutorial, I have provided the easy instructions for updating your account picture using various methods that includes: via settings app or control panel or Microsoft account or Photos app!. Updating your or change gives a personal touch to your user profile. Whether you prefer a professional photo, an avatar, or something fun, your account picture is visible when logging in, making it a great way to add personality to your Windows 11 experience.

From Microsoft Support: Goto settings -> Choose Accounts -> Your Info, -> Under “ ” option -> option -> You can choose your image via “ ” or “Camera” or “Available Images”. This is one of the quickest and easiest way to change or update your account picture from your device.

Method 1: Using the Settings App

The in Windows 11 offers a straightforward way to change your account picture. Follow these steps:

  • by pressing Winkey + I.
  • Go to in the left sidebar.
  • Under the section, you’ll see .
  • Click to upload a new picture from your device or to take a photo directly.
  • Select your desired image, and it will automatically become your new account picture.

Make sure to use a square image for the best appearance on your profile.

Method 2: Using Your Microsoft Account

If you’re logged in with a , changing your account picture on the Microsoft website will sync it across your Windows 11 device and other connected Microsoft services:

  • Under , you’ll see your current profile picture. Click .
  • Choose and upload an image from your computer.
  • Crop and adjust the image as desired, then save it.

Changes made here may take some time to sync across all Microsoft services and your Windows 11 device.

Method 3: Using the Control Panel

The offers an alternative way to change your account picture, especially for users with a local account:

  • Open by typing “Control Panel” in the Windows search bar and selecting it.
  • Go to User Accounts > User Accounts option.
  • Choose the Make Changes to my account in pc settings.
  • It will launch the settings app and follow the steps mentioned the mentioned above.

This method is particularly useful for users familiar with legacy settings in Windows.

Method 4: Using the Photos App

For a creative approach, you can use the to set any image as your account picture directly:

  • by searching for it in the Start menu.
  • Browse your photos and select the image you want as your account picture.
  • Right click on the image, and from the dropdown menu, select Set as > Set as account picture.
  • Confirm, and your account picture will be updated instantly.

This method allows you to select and edit images within the Photos app before setting them as your account picture.

items.title: Here's how the options are validated in react-scan source code.
items.author: Ramu Narasinga
items.content:
In this article, we analyze how the options you pass into scan function are validated.

...
import { scan } from 'react-scan';
...
scan({
  enabled: true,
  // report: true,
  // log: true,
  // clearLog: true,
  // playSound: true,
  // renderCountThreshold: 100,
  alwaysShowLabels: true,
  runInProduction: true,
});

The object passed as a parameter to the scan function is what we analyze to understand how its validated.

validateOptions has almost 100 lines of code at the time of writing this article.

Let’s review the main concepts.

const validateOptions = (options: Partial<Options>): Partial<Options> => {
  const errors: Array<string> = [];
  const validOptions: Partial<Options> = {};

This is how the function is defined and errors is an array of string.

 for (const key in options) {
    if (!isOptionKey(key)) continue;

    const value = options[key];
    switch (key) {

key in options is looped through and there is a switch case used to validate options.

 case 'enabled':
// case 'includeChildren':
case 'log':
case 'showToolbar':
// case 'report':
// case 'alwaysShowLabels':
case 'dangerouslyForceRunInProduction':
  if (typeof value !== 'boolean') {
    errors.push(`- ${key} must be a boolean. Got "${value}"`);
  } else {
    validOptions[key] = value;
  }
  break;

errors array is pushed with some error message specific to boolean check.

case 'onCommitStart':
  if (typeof value !== 'function') {
    errors.push(`- ${key} must be a function. Got "${value}"`);
  } else {
    validOptions.onCommitStart = value as () => void;
  }
  break;
case 'onCommitFinish':
  if (typeof value !== 'function') {
    errors.push(`- ${key} must be a function. Got "${value}"`);
  } else {
    validOptions.onCommitFinish = value as () => void;
  }
  break;
case 'onRender':
  if (typeof value !== 'function') {
    errors.push(`- ${key} must be a function. Got "${value}"`);
  } else {
    validOptions.onRender = value as (
      fiber: Fiber,
      renders: Array<Render>,
    ) => void;
  }
  break;

These checks validate that options such as onCommitStart, onCommitFinish, onRender are functions otherwise, respective errors are pushed into the array.

default:
        errors.push(`- Unknown option "${key}"`);

By default, if you pass an option that react-scan does not support, you will see this error in your CLI

Hey, my name is Ramu Narasinga. I study large open-source projects and create content about their codebase architecture and best practices, sharing it through articles, videos.

items.title: 1749. Maximum Absolute Sum of Any Subarray
items.author: MD ARIFUL HAQUE
items.content:
1749. Maximum Absolute Sum of Any Subarray

,

You are given an integer array . The of a subarray [numsl, numsl+1, ..., numsr-1, numsr] is abs(numsl + numsl+1 + ... + numsr-1 + numsr).

Return the absolute sum of any () subarray of .

Note that is defined as follows:

  • If is a negative integer, then .
  • If is a non-negative integer, then .
  • nums = [1,-3,2,3,-4]
  • The subarray [2,3] has absolute sum = abs(2+3) = abs(5) = 5.
  • nums = [2,-5,1,-4,3,-2]
  • The subarray [-5,1,-4] has absolute sum = abs(-5+1-4) = abs(-8) = 8.
    1. What if we asked for maximum sum, not absolute sum?
    2. It's a standard problem that can be solved by Kadane's algorithm.
    3. The key idea is the max absolute sum will be either the max sum or the min sum.
    4. So just run kadane twice, once calculating the max sum and once calculating the min sum.

    We need to find the maximum absolute sum of any subarray (which can be empty) in a given array of integers. The key insight is that the maximum absolute sum can come from either the maximum subarray sum or the minimum subarray sum, considering their absolute values.

    1. Kadane's Algorithm for Maximum Subarray Sum: This algorithm helps find the maximum sum of any non-empty subarray. We then compare this maximum sum with 0 (the sum of the empty subarray) to determine the overall maximum sum, including the empty subarray.
    2. Modified Kadane's Algorithm for Minimum Subarray Sum: Similarly, we use a modified version of Kadane's algorithm to find the minimum sum of any non-empty subarray. We compare this minimum sum with 0 to determine the overall minimum sum, including the empty subarray.
    3. Calculate Absolute Values: The maximum absolute sum will be the maximum of the absolute values of the overall maximum and minimum sums.
    1. : Using Kadane's algorithm, we iterate through the array while maintaining the current maximum subarray sum ending at each position. The global maximum is updated whenever a larger sum is found. After processing all elements, we compare this global maximum with 0 (the sum of an empty subarray) to get the overall maximum sum.
    2. : Similarly, we use a modified version of Kadane's algorithm to track the minimum subarray sum. After processing all elements, we compare this global minimum with 0 to get the overall minimum sum.
    3. : The result is the maximum of the absolute values of the overall maximum and minimum sums, which gives the maximum absolute sum of any subarray (including the empty subarray).

    This approach efficiently computes the required values in linear time, making it suitable for large input arrays.

    If you want more helpful content like this, feel free to follow me:

items.title: How Ibandronic acid 3 mg solution helps in managing osteoporosis effectively
items.author: Centurion Heathcare
items.content:
Osteoporosis is a serious bone condition that weakens bones, making them fragile and more prone to fractures. This disease is particularly prevalent among postmenopausal women and the elderly, as their bone density tends to decrease with age. To combat this condition effectively, medical professionals recommend bisphosphonates, such as Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection. This medication has gained widespread recognition for its ability to strengthen bones, reduce fracture risks, and improve overall bone health.

As a leading Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection manufacturer, Centurion Healthcare Pvt. Ltd. is committed to providing high-quality pharmaceutical solutions that help patients manage osteoporosis effectively. This blog will explore the benefits of Ibandronic Acid, its mechanism of action, and why it is a preferred choice for osteoporosis treatment.

Understanding Osteoporosis and Its Impact

Osteoporosis occurs when the body loses too much bone mass or produces too little bone. This leads to weakened bones, making individuals highly susceptible to fractures, particularly in the hips, spine, and wrists. While osteoporosis can affect both men and women, postmenopausal women are at a higher risk due to hormonal changes that accelerate bone loss.

• Back pain caused by fractured or collapsed vertebrae • Loss of height over time • Increased risk of bone fractures, even from minor falls

What Is Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection?

Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection is a bisphosphonate medication used to prevent and treat osteoporosis, particularly in postmenopausal women. It works by slowing down the process of bone loss while promoting bone density, thereby reducing the likelihood of fractures. This medication is typically administered once every three months via intravenous injection, making it a convenient treatment option for osteoporosis patients.

Key Benefits of Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection

• Prevents Bone Loss – By inhibiting osteoclast activity, this medication slows bone breakdown, preserving bone strength. • Reduces Fracture Risk – Clinical studies indicate that ibandronic acid significantly lowers the risk of spinal fractures.

• Long-Lasting Effects – Unlike daily oral medications, Ibandronic Acid 3 mg is administered quarterly, improving patient compliance and convenience.

• Enhances Bone Mineral Density (BMD) – Patients undergoing treatment experience increased BMD, reducing their susceptibility to fractures.

Mechanism of Action: How Ibandronic Acid Works

Ibandronic Acid works by selectively binding to bone tissues and inhibiting osteoclasts, the cells responsible for bone resorption. By doing so, it helps maintain bone density and structural integrity. This action is particularly beneficial for postmenopausal women, who experience a rapid decline in bone mass due to decreased estrogen levels.

Why Choose Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection?

For patients struggling with osteoporosis, choosing the right medication is crucial. Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection is often preferred due to its efficacy and ease of administration. Unlike oral bisphosphonates, which can cause gastrointestinal side effects, intravenous ibandronic acid bypasses the digestive system, making it a more tolerable option for many patients.

As a trusted Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection supplier, Centurion Healthcare Pvt. Ltd. ensures that our medication meets international quality standards, providing safe and effective solutions for osteoporosis treatment.

Who Should Consider Ibandronic Acid Treatment?

This medication is primarily recommended for:

• Postmenopausal women diagnosed with osteoporosis • Individuals with a history of osteoporotic fractures

• Patients with low bone mineral density (BMD)

• Those unable to tolerate oral bisphosphonates

However, it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before starting treatment, as they will determine whether Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection is suitable based on individual health conditions.

Dosage and Administration

The standard dosage of Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection is one intravenous injection every three months. It should be administered by a healthcare professional to ensure proper dosage and minimize potential side effects. Patients are advised to maintain adequate calcium and vitamin D intake during the course of treatment to support bone health.

Important Considerations:

• The injection should be administered intravenously over 15–30 seconds. • Patients should remain upright for at least 60 minutes post-injection to reduce potential side effects.

• Regular bone density tests may be required to monitor treatment effectiveness.

Potential Side Effects and Precautions

Like all medications, Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection may cause some side effects, though they are generally well-tolerated. Common side effects include:

• Flu-like symptoms (mild fever, fatigue, muscle pain) • Injection site reactions (redness, swelling)

• Low calcium levels (hypocalcemia)

• Headaches or dizziness

To minimize side effects, patients should follow their doctor’s recommendations regarding calcium and vitamin D supplementation. Additionally, individuals with kidney disorders should consult their physician before using this medication, as dosage adjustments may be necessary.

Why Choose Centurion Healthcare Pvt. Ltd.?

As a leading Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection exporter, Centurion Healthcare Pvt. Ltd. is committed to manufacturing high-quality, effective, and safe pharmaceutical solutions. Our state-of-the-art facilities and strict quality control measures ensure that our products meet international regulatory standards.

• GMP-Certified Manufacturing – Our facilities comply with Good Manufacturing Practices to ensure product safety and efficacy. • Global Reach – We export Ibandronic Acid to numerous countries, catering to international pharmaceutical markets.

• Strict Quality Control – Our products undergo rigorous testing to maintain high industry standards.

• Reliable Supply Chain – We ensure timely delivery and uninterrupted supply of Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection.

Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection plays a vital role in managing osteoporosis by preventing bone loss, improving bone density, and reducing fracture risk. As a preferred Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection manufacturer, Centurion Healthcare Pvt. Ltd. is dedicated to providing high-quality, effective, and safe osteoporosis treatments worldwide.

If you are looking for a trusted Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection supplier or Ibandronic Acid 3 mg Solution for Injection exporter, Centurion Healthcare Pvt. Ltd. is your go-to partner for premium pharmaceutical solutions.

Defect density measures the number of defects found per unit of code or functionality. A high defect density indicates potential quality issues, while a low value suggests robust testing.

Automates defect detection using AI algorithms. Provides real-time insights into defect density, enabling teams to address issues early.

Automation rate measures the percentage of test cases that are automated. A higher automation rate reduces manual effort and accelerates testing cycles.

Automates test case generation and execution. Provides tools for converting manual tests into automated scripts.

Test coverage measures the percentage of code or functionality tested. High test coverage ensures that all critical areas of the application are validated.

Automates defect detection and prioritization. Provides actionable insights to streamline the debugging process.

With Genqe.ai, teams can reduce MTTR and ensure timely defect resolution.

Automating repetitive testing tasks, freeing up resources for high-value activities. Providing tools for converting manual tests into automated scripts.

Offering AI-driven insights to improve testing efficiency and accuracy.

By leveraging Genqe.ai, teams can overcome the limitations of manual testing and accelerate their Salesforce release velocity.

Tracking and optimizing key testing metrics is essential for accelerating Salesforce release velocity. Genqe.ai empowers teams to measure and improve defect density, automation rate, test coverage, test case effectiveness, test execution time, and MTTR. By automating testing processes and providing actionable insights, Genqe.ai helps organizations deliver high-quality Salesforce applications faster and more efficiently. items.title: Remote Usability Testing: Benefits, Process & Tools
items.author: Lollypop Design
items.content:
Usability Testing is among the most widely recognized UX research methods that enable product teams to observe user interactions and gather valuable feedback. However, meeting users in person for testing sessions isn’t always feasible due to challenges like geographical distance or budget limitations. This is where proves invaluable!

This usability testing method provides greater flexibility for designers while offering deeper insights into users’ experiences and contexts. Whether for digital or physical products, remote tests have become increasingly essential in understanding how users engage with your offerings. 

In this blog, we explore the benefits of remote usability testing, its methods and provide our top tips for conducting effective remote usability testing.

What is Remote Usability Testing?

Remote Usability Testing is one of that evaluating how users interact with a product or service by observing them in their natural environment rather than in a controlled lab setting. This approach allows product teams to gather valuable insights into remote user testing behavior, preferences, and challenges without requiring physical presence.

Remote testing is typically conducted using digital tools and platforms, allowing participants to complete tasks or provide feedback through video calls, remote screen-sharing software, or . Depending on the goals of the study, remote testing can be categorized into two types:

  • : Involves a facilitator who guides participants through tasks in real-time via video calls or screen-sharing tools. During the session, the facilitator can ask follow-up questions, provide clarification, and observe how users interact with the product. This allows for a more interactive approach, where facilitators can dig deeper into user behaviors and gather detailed insights.

  • Remote Unmoderated Testing: Allows participants to complete tasks on their own, at their convenience, without a facilitator present. Participants use online tools that record their actions, clicks, and feedback, providing detailed data for analysis after the session. This also eliminates the need for a live facilitator, making it a more cost-effective option for larger-scale studies.

What are Pros and Cons of Remote Usability Testing?

Pros of Remote Usability Testing

  • Reaches a Broader Audience: Remote usability testing allows you to gather feedback from users across different locations and demographics, providing a more diverse range of insights that may not be possible with in-person sessions. This helps you better understand how your product performs in various user contexts.

  • Offers Cost-Effectiveness: By eliminating the need for travel and physical resources, remote testing reduces overall expenses. Teams can conduct multiple tests with a larger group of participants without incurring high costs, making it a more affordable option for businesses.

  • Delivers Real-World Insights: Participants interact with your product in their natural settings, giving you more accurate insights into how users behave in real-life scenarios. This leads to more practical and actionable feedback.

  • Increases Participant Convenience: Users can complete tasks at their own convenience, whether that’s during work breaks or at home, making the testing process less disruptive and more accessible for everyone.

Cons of Remote Usability Testing

  • Prone to Technical Issues: Remote usability testing can face challenges such as poor internet connectivity, compatibility issues with remote testing software, or difficulties in ensuring a seamless testing experience. These technical hurdles can impact the quality of feedback and the accuracy of results.

  • Limits Contextual Observations: Remote testing makes it harder to observe participants' non-verbal cues, such as facial expressions or gestures, which can provide valuable context to their feedback and actions.

  • Reduces Participant Engagement: Without a facilitator present, users may become distracted or provide shallow responses, leading to less meaningful insights.

How to conduct Remote Usability Testing?

Remote usability tests are invaluable for understanding user behavior and identifying areas for improvement in a product's user experience, all without geographic constraints. Here’s a detailed step-by-step guide to conducting remote usability testing effectively: 

1. Define Objectives, Scope & Testing Method

The foundation of successful remote usability tests lies in well-defined objectives and a clear scope. Before beginning, you should clarify the following:

  • : What are you hoping to learn? Are you measuring ease of navigation, identifying task completion barriers, or testing a new feature's intuitiveness? For instance, if your goal is to evaluate a checkout process, focus on how users interact with each step of that flow.

  • : Identify the product aspects and user tasks to test, such as signing up, searching for information, or completing a transaction. Keep the scope manageable to avoid overwhelming participants during the test session.

  • : Choose between moderated or unmoderated testing. Moderated tests, conducted live via video calls or specialized tools, allow you to interact with users in real-time. Unmoderated tests, on the other hand, enable participants to complete tasks independently, with results captured on an insight platform.

You can define like Task Success Rate, Time on Task, and Error Rate to assess performance quantitatively.

2. Set Up Usability tasks

Tasks are the core of any usability test, guiding participants through specific scenarios to evaluate the product’s usability. To set up effective usability tasks, you should:

  • : Focus on essential actions aligned with your objectives. For example, if testing a fitness app, tasks include creating an account, logging a workout, or remote viewing test progress charts. Limit each test session to 3–5 tasks to ensure participants remain engaged.

  • Create Realistic Scenarios: Frame tasks in ways that mimic real-world usage. Instead of instructing users to "Click the login button," say, "You want to access your saved workouts. How would you log in to your account?"

  • : Before launching the full study, conduct a pilot session with a colleague or a neutral participant. This step helps fine-tune task clarity, instructions, and the testing setup, ensuring a smooth experience during the actual sessions.

3. Recruit Participants for the Remote Research

The quality of insights depends on the relevance of your participants. Recruiting the right people ensures your results reflect the target audience’s experience.

  • Define Your Target Audience: Outline participant characteristics, such as demographics, technical proficiency, and familiarity with similar products. For example, if testing a budgeting app, target users who actively track expenses.

  • Decide on Recruitment Methods: Leverage platforms like UserTesting, Respondent, or your network to find participants. Use social media or your existing user base to recruit effectively.

  • : Use screener surveys with neutral, open-ended questions like "What tools do you currently use for budgeting?" to filter candidates without bias.

  • : For initial usability testing, 5–7 participants can uncover the majority of usability issues. For broader testing, consider multiple waves with iterative improvements.

: Provide participants with clear instructions and confirm schedules to reduce confusion before the test session.

4. Facilitate Remote Usability Testing

Executing the remote usability test requires a structured yet flexible approach to gather meaningful insights.

  • : Use platforms like Lookback, Maze, or UserTesting to manage the test session. These tools support features like screen sharing, session recording, and real-time interaction.

  • Set Up a Comfortable Environment: For remote testing, ensure participants have stable internet access and the necessary tools. Brief them on any software or platforms they’ll need to use.

  • Provide Clear Instructions: Begin each session by explaining the purpose of the test. Emphasize that you are testing the product, not their abilities, to alleviate any anxiety. Avoid leading participants—let them interact naturally with the product.

  • Encourage Think-Aloud Protocol: Prompt users to verbalize their thoughts with questions like "What are you trying to do?" or "What do you expect to happen?" This reveals cognitive processes and areas of confusion.

  • : Monitor participant behavior during the session. Take note of hesitation, frustration, or unexpected actions. For moderated tests, adapt questions or scenarios dynamically to explore interesting observations further.

5. Document the Test Results

Capturing detailed results is essential for actionable improvements. Use both qualitative and quantitative data to build a comprehensive picture.

  • : Organize findings into themes, such as navigation problems, unclear labels, or interaction errors.

  • : Incorporate session recordings, screenshots, or heatmaps to highlight key moments of confusion or struggle.

  • : Use metrics like task completion rates and average time on task to measure usability objectively.

  • Highlight Participant Feedback: Include direct quotes from participants to add context and depth to the issues. By following these steps, you can successfully conduct remote usability tests to gain valuable insights and improve your product. Using an insight platform simplifies the process, making it easier to gather, analyze, and take action on user feedback.

Remote Usability Testing Tools

Selecting the right tools for remote usability tests is crucial to streamline the testing process and gather actionable insights. Below, we provide an overview of some of the top tools and their key features tailored for usability testing.

UserTesting is a powerful remote usability testing tool that enables teams to gather video feedback directly from testers. With its extensive tester pool and versatile features, UserTesting is ideal for organizations seeking in-depth insights into user behavior and experiences.

Key Features for Remote Usability Testing:

  • : Access a vast global network of real users, ensuring comprehensive feedback across demographics, unlike platforms with limited or narrow participant pools.

  • : This industry-leading AI and ML-powered feature analyzes verbal and behavioral data to uncover key insights, accelerating decision-making and helping teams make informed choices efficiently.

  • : Evaluate early-stage design concepts to gather actionable feedback on usability and functionality before moving to development.

  • : A rich library of testing templates for various use cases, making test creation quick and efficient.

  • : Heatmaps, card sorting, live website prompts, benchmarking,..

Lookback is a user research platform designed for teams focused on qualitative insights and real-time user interaction. Its emphasis on moderated usability testing and collaboration makes it an excellent choice for teams conducting in-depth user interviews and mobile app evaluations.

Key Features for Remote Usability Testing:

  • Real-Time User Interviews: Conduct live moderated sessions to gather immediate feedback and observe user behavior.

  • Collaborative Note-Taking: Enable team members to document observations and insights during or after the session.

  • Session Recording and Analysis: Record user interactions for playback, review, and in-depth analysis.

  • : Test iOS and Android apps to identify usability issues on mobile platforms.

Optimal Workshop is a comprehensive suite of user research tools designed to enhance UX design. With tools tailored for evaluating navigational structures and content organization, it’s a preferred choice for product managers and designers aiming to improve the usability of complex systems.

Key Features for Remote Usability Testing:

  • Robust Tree-Testing Functionality: Evaluate information architecture by testing how users navigate content hierarchies, identifying bottlenecks or areas of confusion.

  • ** Other features**: Card sorting, first-click testing,...

PlaybookUX is a powerful user research platform designed to assist organizations in conducting comprehensive research across various stages of the design process. With support for a wide range of research methods—including unmoderated testing, moderated interviews, card sorting, tree testing, and surveys—PlaybookUX equips researchers with the tools needed to gather meaningful insights. 

Key Features for Remote Usability Testing:

  • Collaboration with Unlimited Team Members: Enables seamless teamwork by allowing unlimited users to contribute and collaborate on research projects.

  • Tags and Universal Search: Organize and locate data effortlessly with tagging and a universal search feature, making analysis more efficient.

  • Recorded Feedback and Detailed Reporting: Provides video recordings, transcripts, and customizable reports to document user insights comprehensively. 

  • : moderated interviews, card sorting, and surveys.

Exciting Year-End Opportunity!

This year-end, don’t miss your chance to claim a through our exclusive . Discover actionable insights and uncover key improvement areas in your product using and proven to gain a competitive edge in 2025.

Don’t miss out—this opportunity won’t last long! Register now and take the first step toward innovation and success!

items.title: What is Cryogenic Deburring? Which Industries Benefit from It? ❄️🔧
items.author: henglihong
items.content:
In precision manufacturing, burr removal is a crucial process to ensure high-quality components. Traditional deburring methods may lead to inefficiency, part damage, or compromised precision. Cryogenic Deburring has emerged as an advanced solution, offering a precise, automated, and environmentally friendly approach. This article explores its working principles, advantages, and applicable industries to help manufacturing engineers and procurement managers make informed decisions.

How Does Cryogenic Deburring Work? 🧊 Cryogenic deburring uses liquid nitrogen to cool parts to extremely low temperatures (-100°C or below), making burrs brittle and easier to remove. The process involves:

  1. Cryogenic Cooling: The workpiece is exposed to a low-temperature environment to embrittle burrs.
  2. Media Blasting: Fine plastic particles or other media are blasted at high speed to remove burrs selectively.
  3. Debris Collection: The removed burrs are collected and filtered, ensuring a clean final product.

Advantages of Cryogenic Deburring 💡 ✅ High Precision & Efficiency – Removes micro burrs quickly, even on complex geometries. ✅ – The base material remains flexible, ensuring only burrs are removed. ✅ – No chemicals, dust, or harmful emissions, making it a sustainable choice. ✅ – Ideal for batch processing, reducing labor costs and improving consistency.

Industries That Benefit from Cryogenic Deburring 🔍 Cryogenic deburring is widely used in industries requiring high precision: 🚗 – Engine components, transmission gears, fuel injectors. 📟 – Miniature connectors, precision plastic parts. 🏥 – Surgical tools, implantable devices. ✈️ – Turbine blades, precision aluminum components. ⚙️ – Plastic molds, die-cast parts.

❓Q1: Which materials can be processed using cryogenic deburring? A: This technique is suitable for plastics, rubber, aluminum alloys, and stainless steel, especially for intricate parts where traditional deburring is challenging.

Q2: Does cryogenic deburring affect part dimensions? A: No, it selectively removes burrs while preserving the original dimensions of the part.

Q3: Is cryogenic deburring cost-effective? A: Although the initial investment in equipment is higher, the long-term benefits include reduced labor costs, higher efficiency, and improved product quality.

🎯 Cryogenic deburring is a high-precision, eco-friendly, and automated solution for removing burrs, making it ideal for industries that demand top-tier quality. For manufacturing engineers and procurement managers, adopting this technology enhances production efficiency and ensures superior component performance. With advancements in automation, cryogenic deburring is set to become an industry standard in precision manufacturing.

💡 Want to optimize your production process? Consider cryogenic deburring as your next upgrade! 🚀

items.title: Important React Hooks⚓
items.author: aryan015
items.content:
React Hooks allow developers to use state and lifecycle features in functional components. Introduced in React 16.8, hooks simplify component logic and improve code readability. This guide covers the most important React hooks and their use cases.

1. useState – State Management

  • Manages local component state.
  • Accepts an initial state and returns an array with the current state and a function to update it.

2. useEffect – Side Effects

  • Runs side effects like fetching data, subscriptions, or manual DOM manipulation.
  • Cleanup function prevents memory leaks.

3. useContext – Context API

  • Accesses global state without prop drilling.
  • Works well with the Context API.

4. useRef – Referencing DOM Elements

  • Creates a mutable reference to a DOM element.
  • Useful for persisting values across renders without re-rendering.

5. useReducer – Complex State Management

  • Alternative to useState for managing complex state logic.
  • Uses a reducer function to update state.

6. useMemo – Performance Optimization

  • Caches expensive calculations to avoid unnecessary recomputations.
  • Only re-executes when dependencies change.

7. useCallback – Memoizing Functions

  • Memoizes functions to prevent unnecessary re-creations.
  • Useful in performance optimization.

Understanding and using React hooks effectively can significantly improve your development workflow. These essential hooks cover state management, performance optimizations, and side effects, helping developers build scalable and efficient applications.

items.title: 🚀 The Future of AI Coding: From Text Generation to Full-Scale Engineering!
items.author: Herche Jane
items.content:
🤖 AI is Changing Coding, But is it Enough? Over the past few years, AI has been making waves in software development. From GitHub Copilot to ChatGPT, it has transformed the way developers write code, optimize logic, and debug issues.

But let’s be honest. If you've tried AI-generated code, you've likely run into some frustrating limitations. AI might generate impressive snippets, but can it truly build a working application?

💡 The real challenge isn't just writing code—it's managing dependencies, testing, optimizing, and deploying the entire project. And that’s where AI is still lacking.

💥 The Three Major Pain Points of AI-Powered Coding 1️⃣ AI Generates Code, But Doesn’t Build Projects

"Create a blog system for me!"

It returns a backend API snippet or a Vue component. But what happens next?

You still need to manually: ✅ Set up the project structure ✅ Configure environments

AI doesn’t build fully functional applications—it just outputs isolated code snippets. Most AI-generated code lacks a cohesive structure, requiring developers to manually adjust and integrate everything.

2️⃣ AI-Generated Code is Often Unusable What if AI writes an authentication API for you? You might get a Flask snippet, but...

❌ No database schema? ❌ Missing authentication & security layers?

❌ Exposed passwords in API calls?

❌ Inconsistent and unmaintainable code?

AI-generated code ≠ production-ready code.

It often lacks architectural design, modularization, and proper security considerations. If you don’t double-check, you might even introduce vulnerabilities into your application.

3️⃣ AI Writes Code, But Who Tests, Optimizes, and Deploys It? Even if AI provides a full-stack web application, you still have to do the heavy lifting:

🔹 Who writes tests? AI doesn’t generate functional test cases. 🔹 Who optimizes the code? AI-generated code may be inefficient and require refactoring.

🔹 Who deploys it? AI might suggest "use Docker", but it won't configure the full pipeline.

💡 AI is not yet a development assistant—it's just a coding assistant. It remains at the text-generation level, instead of true engineering automation.

🎯 The Future: AI That Builds, Not Just Writes To truly help developers, AI must move beyond generating snippets. It needs to execute entire projects.

This is exactly what AI Dev Engineer aims to achieve.

Instead of just generating code, we are building AI that can construct entire projects, including:

✅ Automated project scaffolding – AI initializes complete project structures, not just snippets. ✅ Dependency management – AI installs and manages dependencies, ensuring a stable environment.

✅ Automated testing – AI generates executable test cases instead of saying, "Please test this."

✅ Intelligent code optimization – AI analyzes performance and suggests improvements.

✅ One-click deployment – AI doesn’t just generate a Dockerfile—it sets up and deploys the project.

💡 We are building an AI development assistant—not just a code generator. 🚀

🔥 Join Us—Help AI Become Smarter! We're creating AI Dev Engineer, an open-source initiative that allows AI to actively participate in software development—reducing repetitive tasks and turning AI-generated text into fully functional projects.

But we can't do this alone. We need YOU!

👨‍💻 Full-stack developers – Help us refine AI-generated frontend & backend architectures. ⚙️ DevOps engineers – Assist in automating CI/CD and AI-driven deployments.

🧠 AI researchers – Improve the efficiency and reliability of AI-generated code.

🔍 QA engineers – Teach AI how to generate proper test cases.

AI should not be limited to text generation. Let’s build a true AI-powered software engineer—one that constructs, tests, and deploys entire projects automatically! 🔥🔥🔥

💬 What do you think? 🚀 Would you trust AI to build an entire software project for you?

Drop a comment below and let’s discuss! 💡👇

🔗 Stay Connected: 📢 Follow me for more AI + Dev content!
